explanation: Make "CLUE" cryptic (rearrange its letters) and add R (right) to get ULCER, a "painful thing".
hints: The definition is a little vague - it's "painful thing".
Right can be represented by an R, which will go at the end of our answer.
What could "cryptic clue" be telling us to do?
Make "clue" cryptic, by rearranging its letters.
